subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! From dawn until nightfall do I supplicate at the gate of Thy mercy, and from eventide until [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی من الغداه الی العشاء اتضرع الی باب رحمتک و من المساء الی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed
